'''nganojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iacinct|iacinct]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-n-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iacinct|iacinct]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nganojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngænejeth|ngænejeth]] || [[word:ngænejej|ngænejej]] || [[word:ngænejesh|ngænejesh]] || [[word:ngæneje|ngæneje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nganonojoth|nganonojoth]] || [[word:nganonojoj|nganonojoj]] || [[word:nganonojosh|nganonojosh]] || [[word:nganonojo|nganonojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nganojoth|nganojoth]] || [[word:nganojoj|nganojoj]] || [[word:nganojosh|nganojosh]] || [[word:nganojo|nganojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nganofjoth|nganofjoth]] || [[word:nganofjoj|nganofjoj]] || [[word:nganofjosh|nganofjosh]] || [[word:nganofjof|nganofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nganojotho|nganojotho]] || [[word:nganojojo|nganojojo]] || [[word:nganojosho|nganojosho]] || [[word:nganojoko|nganojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nganojoth|nganojoth]] || [[word:nganojoj|nganojoj]] || [[word:nganojosh|nganojosh]] || [[word:nganojo|nganojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nganojothol|nganojothol]] || [[word:nganojojol|nganojojol]] || [[word:nganojoshol|nganojoshol]] || [[word:nganojokol|nganojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nganojothotho|nganojothotho]] || [[word:nganojojojo|nganojojojo]] || [[word:nganojoshosho|nganojoshosho]] || [[word:nganojoko|nganojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nganojothon|nganojothon]] || [[word:nganojojon|nganojojon]] || [[word:nganojoshon|nganojoshon]] || [[word:nganojokon|nganojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nganojothoro|nganojothoro]] || [[word:nganojojoro|nganojojoro]] || [[word:nganojoshoro|nganojoshoro]] || [[word:nganojokoro|nganojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
